items.sentence: It is often been said that the key to great photography is patience and dedication.

explanationContent.whyCorrect: The extra word is "been" — present simple passive.
explanationContent.grammarFocus: Present simple passive uses is/are + past participle — been is not needed after is in this pattern.

wrongOptions.It: "It" is necessary here — the extra word is "been".
wrongOptions.is: "is" is necessary here — the extra word is "been".
